response.original_title: Rosie O'Donnell Joins The Best People With Nicolle Wallace
response.overview: In a candid conversation, Rosie opens up about her decades-long feud with Trump and the personal reasons behind her move to Ireland; the two also reflect on their time co-hosting "The View," where they were originally cast as political adversaries.
response.title: Rosie O'Donnell Joins The Best People With Nicolle Wallace
